tests.test_name: Submitting a multi-file batch returns 202 Accepted
tests.feature: Multi-file batch processing and email delivery
tests.journey: A user submits a multi-file batch with two fixtures and verifies the backend acknowledges the request with HTTP 202 Accepted and displays a batch status card.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Submitting a multi-file batch returns 202 Accepted
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User enables multi-file mode, selects format and role, adds two fixture files to the queue, and submits
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Batch status card is visible and backend responded with status 202

tests.test_name: A multifile_batch_complete event is logged after the batch completes
tests.feature: Multi-file batch processing and email delivery
tests.journey: A user submits a single-file batch and verifies that a usage log event of type 'multifile_batch_complete' is recorded with a positive processing duration.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: A multifile_batch_complete event is logged after the batch completes
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User enables multi-file mode, selects format and role, adds one fixture file, and submits
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: A 'multifile_batch_complete' usage log event is recorded with a positive processing_ms value

tests.test_name: Batch status card transitions to complete state after processing finishes
tests.feature: Multi-file batch processing and email delivery
tests.journey: A user submits a batch and observes the status card moving through a polling state before settling on a completion state that confirms results were emailed.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Batch status card transitions to complete state after processing finishes
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User enables multi-file mode, selects format and role, adds one fixture file, and submits
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Status card first shows polling state, then transitions to completion state displaying 'Results emailed'

tests.test_name: Batch status card can be dismissed after completion
tests.feature: Multi-file batch processing and email delivery
tests.journey: A user submits a batch, waits for it to complete, then dismisses the status card and verifies it is no longer visible.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Batch status card can be dismissed after completion
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page with a completed batch status card visible
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User clicks the dismiss button on the batch status card
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: The batch status card is no longer visible on the page
